# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: sidecar-injection-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: "*"
  envoyFilters:
  - kind: EnvoyFilter
    metadata:
      name: enable-envoy-admin
    spec:
      workloadSelector:
        labels:
          app: "*"
      configPatches:
      - applyTo: LISTENER
        match:
          context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
          listener:
            filterChain:
              filter:
                name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
        patch:
          operation: MERGE
          value:
            options:
              access_log:
              - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdio
                typed_config:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stdio.v3.StdiOAccessLogConfig
      - applyTo: LISTENER
        match:
          context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
          listener:
            filterChain:
              filter:
                name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
        patch:
          operation: MERGE
          value:
            options:
              access_log:
              - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdio
                typed_config:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stdio.v3.StdiOAccessLogConfig
      - applyTo: HTTP_FILTER
        match:
          context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
          listener:
            filterChain:
              filter:
                name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
          httpFilter:
            name: envoy.filters.http.router
        patch:
          operation: INSERT_BEFORE
          value:
            name: envoy.filters.http.envoy_fault
      - applyTo: HTTP_FILTER
        match:
          context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
          listener:
            filterChain:
              filter:
                name: "envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager"
          httpFilter:
            name: envoy.filters.http.router
        patch:
          operation: INSERT_BEFORE
          value:
            name: envoy.filters.http.envoy_fault
      - applyTo: CLUSTER
        match:
          cluster:
            service:
              name: "*"
        patch:
          operation: MERGE
          value:
            connectTimeout: 0.25s
            lbPolicy: ROUND_ROBIN
